name: Enbridge Energy, LP v. Nessel
short_description: A civil procedure dispute over whether federal courts can excuse an untimely notice of removal under the removal statute.
legal_question: Whether district courts have authority to excuse (including through equitable tolling) the 30-day deadline for removal in 28 U.S.C. § 1446(b)(1) when a case is removed from state to federal court.
petitioner_argument_summary: Petitioner argues the 30-day removal deadline is non-jurisdictional and may be equitably tolled or otherwise excused in appropriate circumstances.
respondent_argument_summary: Respondent argues the removal deadline is mandatory and that a timely motion to remand requires remand when removal is untimely, without equitable exceptions.
